name: Bacon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown, drain, and crumble the bacon.
2. Place the bacon in the bottom of a greased 11x7 inch dish.
3. Top the bacon with chopped onions and grated Jack cheese.
4. In a blender, mix together Bisquick, sour cream, eggs, salt, and pepper for 1 minute.
5. Pour the mixture over the bacon and cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean (35-45 minutes).
